title: Alexei0000/digitalHumanities: v1.0.0 — LLM-Assisted Character Interaction Extraction & Social Network Analysis Pipeline
author: Aleksej
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
WH40K-SNA Pipeline 
 A multi-stage character interaction extraction pipeline powered by
Large Language Models (LLMs) for Social Network Analysis of literary corpora. 
 Features 
 
 📖 Scene segmentation (semantic similarity + rule-based fallback) 
 🧑 Character extraction via LLM 
 💬 Dialogue extraction & speaker/listener attribution 
 😠 Sentiment scoring for character interactions 
 🕸️ Weighted edge generation for SNA (Gephi-compatible CSV output) 
 🔄 SQLite-based progress tracking with crash recovery 
 ⚡ Async batch processing via Python asyncio 
 
 Tech Stack 
 
  LLM Inference:  Ollama (gemma4:31b / qwen3.5:9b) 
  Embeddings:  BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 via sentence-transformers 
  Structured Output:  Pydantic validation 
  Visualization:  Gephi (ForceAtlas2)
